common_assumptions: File exists at expected path without verification
Previous session state and process state are unchanged
Tool output is complete and untruncated
A single edit will resolve the issue without runtime testing
Environment variables and credentials are correctly set
Git working tree state matches expectation from earlier in session
strength_patterns: Thorough pre-edit reads: most substantive chains read multiple context files before writing, reducing blind edits
Post-change verification: type-check and build commands (tsc --noEmit, npm run check) appear after edits in ~40% of tool-heavy chains
Diagnostic breadth on failures: chains like fb93d9e7 fan out across multiple diagnostic surfaces before narrowing
weakness_patterns: Same-file re-edit loops without re-reading or root-cause analysis: f3ddfd2f calls statusline.sh 20+ times, fa0b19cf edits +page.svelte 50+ times, fc4190a7 edits +layout.svelte 20+ times
Repeated identical commands on failure without hypothesis change: f3ddfd2f reruns statusline-diag.py and statusline-test.py in unbroken sequence with no intervening diagnostic pivot
Premature closure on trivial chains: 7 of 31 chains are 0-2 steps with no tool use, suggesting context was not checked before responding to tasks that warranted it
